name: Buckwheat Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Place all ingredients in the order given into the bread pan.
3. Select white bread setting and start baking.
4. Makes 1 loaf, yielding 8 slices. Each slice contains 140 calories, 1 gram of dietary fiber, less than 1 gram of soluble fiber, 26 grams of carbohydrates, 4 grams of protein, 2 grams of fat (13% calories from fat), less than 1 milligram of cholesterol, and 268 milligrams of sodium.
